response.justification: Despite extensive software experience, the candidate lacks relevant Java proficiency for this junior role, has no demonstrable experience in insurance or agile consulting projects, and only has basic German — a hard requirement for client collaboration in Germany.
strengths: Extensive full-stack development experience across multiple languages and domains
Strong track record of open-source contributions and technical workshops
Demonstrated ability to work in distributed, cross-functional teams
concerns: Minimal Java experience despite role requiring Java proficiency
German language skills are only basic, not sufficient for client-facing consulting
Overqualified with senior roles, raising risk of misalignment with junior position expectations
